languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor sighs — and you can hear the distinct relief in his voice.{/n} "I'm... pleased. Pleased to return to oblivion. I hope the memory of your sorrowful age will be mercifully erased from my mind. Farewell, my—"

languages.text: {n}Предок вздыхает — и вы слышите отчетливое облегчение в его голосе.{/n} "Я... рад. Рад вернуться к забытью. Надеюсь, память о вашем скорбном веке будет милосердно стерта из моей памяти. Прощайте, насле..."

{n}Your ancestor sighs — and you can hear the distinct relief in his voice.{/n} "I'm... pleased. Pleased to return to oblivion. I hope the memory of your sorrowful age will be mercifully erased from my mind. Farewell, my—"

languages.text: {n}Tu ancestro suspira... y oyes el alivio en su voz.{/n} «Estoy... satisfecho. Estoy satisfecho con mi regreso al olvido. Espero que el recuerdo de esta triste era desaparezca de mi mente. Adiós, he...».
languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor sighs — and you can hear the distinct relief in his voice.{/n} "I'm... pleased. Pleased to return to oblivion. I hope the memory of your sorrowful age will be mercifully erased from my mind. Farewell, my—"

traits.locale_text: {n}Tu ancestro suspira... y oyes el alivio en su voz.{/n} «Estoy... satisfecho. Estoy satisfecho con mi regreso al olvido. Espero que el recuerdo de esta triste era desaparezca de mi mente. Adiós, he...».

languages.text: {n}你的先祖叹了口气，你能听出他语气中的解脱。{/n}“我……很高兴，很高兴重归虚无。但愿你那悲哀时代的记忆也能从我脑中消失。再见了，我的——”
languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor sighs — and you can hear the distinct relief in his voice.{/n} "I'm... pleased. Pleased to return to oblivion. I hope the memory of your sorrowful age will be mercifully erased from my mind. Farewell, my—"

traits.locale_text: {n}你的先祖叹了口气，你能听出他语气中的解脱。{/n}“我……很高兴，很高兴重归虚无。但愿你那悲哀时代的记忆也能从我脑中消失。再见了，我的——”

languages.text: {n}Votre ancêtre pousse un soupir, puis répond sur un ton empreint de soulagement :{/n} « Je suis... heureux. Heureux de replonger dans l'oubli. J'espère que le souvenir de votre triste époque sera effacé de ma mémoire. Adieu, mon... »
languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor sighs — and you can hear the distinct relief in his voice.{/n} "I'm... pleased. Pleased to return to oblivion. I hope the memory of your sorrowful age will be mercifully erased from my mind. Farewell, my—"

traits.locale_text: {n}Votre ancêtre pousse un soupir, puis répond sur un ton empreint de soulagement :{/n} « Je suis... heureux. Heureux de replonger dans l'oubli. J'espère que le souvenir de votre triste époque sera effacé de ma mémoire. Adieu, mon... »

languages.text: {n}Atan iç çekiyor. Sesindeki belirgin rahatlamayı duyabiliyorsun.{/n} "Ben... Memnunum. Yok oluşa döneceğim için memnunum. Umarım o kederli çağının anısı zihnimden merhametle silinir. Elveda sevgili..."
languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor sighs — and you can hear the distinct relief in his voice.{/n} "I'm... pleased. Pleased to return to oblivion. I hope the memory of your sorrowful age will be mercifully erased from my mind. Farewell, my—"

traits.locale_text: {n}Atan iç çekiyor. Sesindeki belirgin rahatlamayı duyabiliyorsun.{/n} "Ben... Memnunum. Yok oluşa döneceğim için memnunum. Umarım o kederli çağının anısı zihnimden merhametle silinir. Elveda sevgili..."

languages.text: {n}Dein Vorfahr seufzt — und du erkennst die Erleichterung in seiner Stimme.{/n} "Ich ... bin erfreut. Erfreut, in die Vergessenheit zurückzukehren. Ich hoffe, die Erinnerung an Euer trauriges Zeitalter wird aus meinem Gedächtnis getilgt. Lebt wohl ..."
languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor sighs — and you can hear the distinct relief in his voice.{/n} "I'm... pleased. Pleased to return to oblivion. I hope the memory of your sorrowful age will be mercifully erased from my mind. Farewell, my—"

traits.locale_text: {n}Dein Vorfahr seufzt — und du erkennst die Erleichterung in seiner Stimme.{/n} "Ich ... bin erfreut. Erfreut, in die Vergessenheit zurückzukehren. Ich hoffe, die Erinnerung an Euer trauriges Zeitalter wird aus meinem Gedächtnis getilgt. Lebt wohl ..."

languages.text: {n}祖先がため息をつき、その声に安堵が感じられる。{/n} 「私は…満足だ。忘却に還ることに満足だ。君が悲しみに暮れた時代を、私は慈悲深く忘れるだろう。さらば、私の…」
languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor sighs — and you can hear the distinct relief in his voice.{/n} "I'm... pleased. Pleased to return to oblivion. I hope the memory of your sorrowful age will be mercifully erased from my mind. Farewell, my—"

traits.locale_text: {n}祖先がため息をつき、その声に安堵が感じられる。{/n} 「私は…満足だ。忘却に還ることに満足だ。君が悲しみに暮れた時代を、私は慈悲深く忘れるだろう。さらば、私の…」
